message:
feat(conformance): add numerical gradient verification for AD VJP rules

Make vjp_single and vjp public for conformance testing. Add
ad_numerical_verification.rs with finite-difference gradient checks
for linalg (Cholesky, QR, SVD, Eigh, TriangularSolve) and FFT
(Fft, Ifft, Rfft, Irfft) AD rules, comparing VJP outputs against
(L(A+e) - L(A-e)) / 2e numerical approximations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
